mapper.select: SELECT board_type_idx, board_type_code, board_type_name, board_can_comment, board_min_role FROM board_type ORDER BY board_type_idx
SELECT board_type_idx, board_type_code, board_type_name, board_can_comment, board_min_role FROM board_type WHERE board_type_code = #{typeCode}

SELECT b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_view_count, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, bt.board_type_name, bt.board_type_code FROM board b LEFT JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx WHERE b.board_is_deleted = 'N'
AND bt.board_type_code = #{typeCode}
AND (b.board_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.board_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY b.board_idx DESC

SELECT b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_view_count, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, bt.board_type_code, bt.board_type_name FROM board b LEFT JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx WHERE b.board_idx = #{boardIdx} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( mem_idx, board_title, board_content, board_ip, board_thumbnail, board_type_idx ) VALUES ( #{memIdx}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardIp}, #{boardThumbnail}, #{boardTypeIdx} )
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET board_title = #{boardTitle}, board_content = #{boardContent}, board_moddate = NOW() WHERE board_idx = #{boardIdx}
UPDATE board SET board_is_deleted = 'Y', board_deldate = NOW() WHERE board_idx = #{boardIdx}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply WHERE board_idx = #{boardIdx} AND reply_is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT reply_idx, board_idx, mem_idx, reply_content, reply_ip, reply_regdate, reply_moddate, reply_is_deleted, reply_ref, reply_step, reply_depth FROM reply WHERE board_idx = #{boardIdx} AND reply_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY reply_ref ASC, reply_step ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply ( board_idx, mem_idx, reply_content, reply_ip, reply_ref, reply_step, reply_depth ) VALUES ( #{boardIdx}, #{memIdx}, #{replyContent}, #{replyIp}, #{replyRef}, #{replyStep}, #{replyDepth} )
mapper.select: SELECT reply_idx, board_idx, mem_idx, reply_content, reply_ip, reply_regdate, reply_ref, reply_step, reply_depth FROM reply WHERE reply_idx = #{replyIdx}
mapper.update: UPDATE reply SET reply_is_deleted = 'Y', reply_deldate = NOW() WHERE reply_idx = #{replyIdx}
